collections.title: Lacrimae Mundi
collections.intro: Exploring humanity's spiritual paths — the soul caught between altar and totem, suffering and rage, surrender and resistance.

pieces.label: Lacrimae Mundi — I
pieces.title: Influenced by Orthodox Baroque and African Sacred Art Reliquary Plastron Necklace “Lacrimae Mundi — The Tears of the World”

images.alt: Sculptural reliquary plastron necklace with African wooden mask and Byzantine-inspired gold filigree, one-of-a-kind wearable art by Svetlana Kisselev
Detail of hand-carved African wooden mask pendant with brass filigree, cowrie shells and freshwater pearls, Lacrimae Mundi collection

pieces.narrative: Faith wears many faces. Suffering speaks a single language.

technical.type: Stylized sculptural necklace · One of a Kind · Paris 2026
technical.description: The artwork consists of two interconnected elements: a dramatic choker-corset embracing the throat, inspired by the iconic neck adornments of the Kayan women, transforming the neck into a sacred architectural space where the body itself becomes a reliquary; and an oversized pectoral plastron pendant, drawing inspiration from Byzantine and Orthodox reliquaries and devotional icons, fused with the visual language of African ceremonial masks and ritual objects. Together, these elements create a sculptural composition where sacred traditions converge into a single contemporary form.
technical.materials: Hand-carved African wooden mask, brass stampings, gold-tone filigree components, freshwater pearls, genuine horn elements, cowrie shell, various seed, wooden and glass beads. 24k matt gold plated findings: beads, spacer beads. Other mixed metal findings.

collections.title: 1001 Nights
collections.intro: An invitation into the scented opulence of the Orient, rendered in gold and gemstone. Excess as refinement. Myth as adornment. An irresistible world, saturated with beauty.

pieces.label: 1001 Nights — I
pieces.title: Inspired by Orientalist Dreams, Asymmetrical Statement Earrings “1001 Nights — An Irresistible World of Excess”

images.alt: Orientalist-inspired asymmetrical statement earrings with gold filigree and faceted turquoise glass stones, one-of-a-kind wearable art by Svetlana Kisselev
Detail of gold-tone filigree earring with dangling gold stars and pearl accents, 1001 Nights collection

pieces.narrative: An endless journey between beauty and excess — the myth that refinement is never enough, that finery must be saturated to be irresistible.

technical.type: Stylized Ceremonial Asymmetrical Earrings · One of a Kind · Paris 2026
technical.description: The artwork consists of two interconnected elements — a single narrative unfolding across two supports, each completing the other. Together, these elements create a narrative composition where craft traditions converge into a single reawakened form.
technical.materials: Brass stampings, gold-tone filigree components, faceted glass stones in turquoise, purple, and teal, pearl accents, dangling gold stars. The paper imagery is hand-treated to replicate the look of aged, crackled oil paintings.

pieces.label: 1001 Nights — II
pieces.title: Inspired by Orientalist Dreams, Statement Mono Earring “1001 Nights — An Irresistible World of Excess”

images.alt: Orientalist-inspired gold statement mono earring with faceted turquoise glass stones and dangling gold stars, one-of-a-kind wearable art by Svetlana Kisselev

pieces.narrative: Legendary Oriental opulence — even alone, it is more than enough.

technical.type: Stylized Ceremonial Mono Earring · One of a Kind · Paris 2026
technical.description: A single narrative piece that delivers the whole story.
technical.materials: Brass stampings, gold-tone filigree components, 24k matt gold plated findings (beads, spacer beads, chain). Other mixed metal findings. Faceted glass stones and cabochons in turquoise, purple, and teal, pearl accents, dangling gold stars. The paper imagery is hand-treated to replicate the look of aged, crackled oil paintings.

pieces.label: 1001 Nights — III
pieces.title: Inspired by Orientalist Dreams, Statement Necklace “1001 Nights — Gilded Captivity”

images.alt: Orientalist-inspired gold statement necklace with faceted glass cabochons and dangling gold stars, 1001 Nights collection by Svetlana Kisselev

pieces.narrative: Legendary Oriental opulence that binds as much as it adorns.

technical.type: Stylized Ceremonial Necklace · One of a Kind · Paris 2026
technical.description: A narrative piece that explores splendor as bondage, and freedom as a choice.
technical.materials: Brass stampings, gold-tone filigree components, 24k matt gold plated findings (beads, spacer beads, chain). Other mixed metal findings. Faceted glass stones and cabochons in turquoise, purple, and teal, pearl accents, dangling gold stars. The paper imagery is hand-treated to replicate the look of aged, crackled oil paintings.

collections.title: Queen Swan
collections.intro: It is an archetype older than language. Half woman, half bird. Suspended between two worlds — the mortal and the eternal, the visible and the sacred. She does not ask permission to be extraordinary. She simply is. She has always been. To wear a piece from this collection is not an act of adornment. It is an act of recognition.

pieces.label: Queen Swan — I
pieces.title: Byzantine-Influenced Transformer Crown “Procession of One”

images.alt: Byzantine-influenced gold transformer crown with detachable pendilia, one-of-a-kind ceremonial headpiece by Svetlana Kisselev
Close-up of Byzantine-inspired gold filigree crown with vintage cabochons and pearls, wearable maximalist baroque-influenced reliquary art
Byzantine-influenced gold crown parure with pendilia, front view, one-of-a-kind ceremonial headpiece
Left side view of Byzantine-influenced gold crown parure with detachable pendilia, wearable maximalist baroque-influenced reliquary art
Right side view of Byzantine-influenced gold crown parure with detachable pendilia, wearable maximalist baroque-influenced reliquary art
Byzantine-influenced crown worn with extra-long gold filigree earrings, front view, convertible transformer jewelry
Left view of Byzantine-influenced crown paired with extra-long earrings, one-of-a-kind convertible parure
Right view of Byzantine-influenced crown paired with extra-long earrings, one-of-a-kind convertible parure

pieces.narrative: Every queen must be crowned — but this is not about power. It is about remembering. This Crown was not designed. It was summoned — from Orthodox icons, from centuries of sacred gold that never stopped glittering in my mind. To wear this crown is not to pretend to royalty. It is to remember that beauty itself is sovereign.

technical.type: Stylized Ceremonial Headpiece · One of a Kind · Paris 2026
technical.description: Transformer parure comprising the crown and its detachable pendilia, convertible into extra-long earrings. Two ways to wear the same parure — crown with pendilia, or crown paired with extra-long earrings.
technical.materials: A mix of genuinely vintage and contemporary findings — brass and gold-tone filigree, glass and epoxy cabochons, rhinestones, an assortment of pearls (metallic, plastic, and freshwater), mother-of-pearl. The paper imagery is hand-treated to replicate the surface of aged paintings, with a crackled, time-worn patina.

pieces.label: Queen Swan — II
pieces.title: Byzantine-Influenced Reliquary Cuff “Sacred Heart’s Armor”

images.alt: Byzantine-influenced reliquary cuff bracelet shaped as a wearable sacred heart altar, one-of-a-kind jewelry piece
Side view of gold filigree reliquary cuff bracelet with vintage cabochons, Queen Swan collection by Svetlana Kisselev

pieces.narrative: An open heart needs armor. An armored heart cannot fly. Only through the pain does it learn to believe.

technical.type: Stylized Ceremonial Wristpiece · One of a Kind · Paris 2026
technical.description: Adjustable Cuff as a Wearable Altar.
technical.materials: A mix of genuinely vintage and contemporary findings — brass and gold-tone filigree, glass and epoxy cabochons, rhinestones, an assortment of pearls (metallic, plastic, and freshwater), mother-of-pearl. The paper imagery is hand-treated to replicate the surface of aged paintings, with a crackled, time-worn patina.

pieces.label: Queen Swan — III
pieces.title: Byzantine-Influenced Reliquary Devotional Pendant “Between Two Worlds”

images.alt: Byzantine-influenced two-tiered reliquary pendant necklace on silk ribbon, devotional wearable art
Detail of gold filigree reliquary pendant with faceted crystal and freshwater pearls, Queen Swan collection

pieces.narrative: Queen and Swan — between two worlds: visible and invisible, real and imaginary, duty and freedom. Two symbols, one devotion.

technical.type: Stylized Ceremonial Pendant Necklace · One of a Kind · Paris 2026
technical.materials: A blend of genuinely vintage and contemporary findings: brass and gold-tone filigree, faceted crystal, freshwater pearl, glass drop, silk ribbon. The paper imagery is hand-treated to replicate the surface of aged paintings, with a crackled, time-worn patina.

pieces.label: Queen Swan — IV
pieces.title: Byzantine-Influenced Reliquary Statement Ring “Devotion on the Hand”

images.alt: Byzantine-influenced reliquary statement ring with hand-painted glass cabochon, one-of-a-kind wearable art by Svetlana Kisselev
Detail of gold filigree reliquary ring with faceted crystal and freshwater pearls, Queen Swan collection
Close-up of hand-painted glass cabochon centerpiece on Byzantine-influenced statement ring, wearable maximalist baroque-influenced reliquary art

pieces.narrative: Queen and Swan — woman and goddess. Two archetypes, one persona. An ex-voto for the Self.

technical.type: Stylized Ceremonial Ring · One of a Kind · Paris 2026
technical.description: Adjustable Ring as a Wearable Ex-voto.
technical.materials: A blend of genuinely vintage and contemporary findings: brass and gold-tone filigree, faceted crystal, freshwater pearl, glass drop, silk ribbon. Handmade center piece glass cabochon with a paper picture.
